title: Brooks Men's Ghost 14 Neutral Running Shoe
description: Smooth roads are ahead when you put on the Ghost 14. This award-winning runner favorite now features 100% DNA LOFT in the midsole, for a softer, smoother ride. We’ve also improved the fit so the shoe adjusts even more comfortably to your foot.
features: THIS MEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride that won’t distract from the fun of the run. The Ghost 14 offers a simplified midsole construction which creates more seamless transitions. This Brooks Ghost 14 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The Ghost 14 offers neutral support while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 13

BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever. DNA LOFT now makes up the entire midsole, for a softer, smoother, ride.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions.
SOFT, SECURE, FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology provides structure that moves with the foot.

reviews.title: The Brooks Ghost line is my favorite 10k-Marathon shoe

reviews.title: A disappointment
reviews.text: Wore these shoes to work and after 3 weeks have 3 rips on sides of shoes and a hole on top of shoe.

reviews.title: These Brooks running shoes are the best sneakers that you can buy. Very comfortable.
reviews.text: These Brooks running shoes are the best sneakers that you can buy. Very comfortable.

reviews.title: Brooks has lost a step on wear/quality, but still a very good shoe
reviews.text:
First, Brooks is a top running shoe manufacturer, and I always like buying their products, and they are to be applauded for releasing shoes in widths, which lets you get a shoe that fits, which is essential. If a shoe does not fit properly, then it will be extremely difficult to run (or walk any distance in). The Brooks Glycerin is one model up from the Ghost, that has better cushioning, but is no longer available in a Narrow width, and is more expensive, but the Ghost is a pretty good shoe on its own. I would have given the Ghost 5 stars, but the Ghost 14 is not quite perfect, having two areas where it could be better (and was better previously).

The first picture shows a Ghost 14 (on the left), next to a Ghost 13 (the previous model, on the right), and you can see the Ghost 14 has less tread, so wears out sooner, I would say roughly 50-75 miles of road (asphalt) running. The picture shows both shoes new. The Ghost 13 also was a little more cushioned, but you can offset that some by putting a different insole in the 14, and a lot of runners replace the insoles anyway. The thinner tread means less mileage on the 14s, but still probably as good as most of the competition, just no longer better here.

The second pictures shows the upper collar on a Ghost 14, and the fabric Brooks is using there (not so much on the 13 and earlier models) is nice and soft, but does not hold up. I generally see holes or failures at the top of the lace area, and on some shoes, towards the back collar area. You get a lot of fraying, sometimes holes, which is more an appearance problem than anything that would impact running in them, but means also you cannot wear them casually, at least where someone might see the failures. That may be an aspect that is supply chain related, they used to hold up better, but I have seen the problem on two pair of Ghost 14s, and other manufacturers do a bit better (probably needs a bit more nylon, to hold up longer).

I will say that the Ghost 14 has a narrower tongue at the top, that is shared with the 13 but was new there, and I have not seen it much in other shoes, but actually works very well, so I give kudos to Brooks on that design innovation. There is less chance that during a run the tongue will shift over into the forefoot, at least in a painful way, and you don't have to stop to shift it back.

So overall, particularly at this price point, the Brooks continues to be good value and one of the top shoes to consider, but as with anything, there are a couple of areas that could use further improvement.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Kenun Lyte MX Running Shoes
description: Cloud-like comfort meets street-forward style in the ultra-lightweight GEL-Kenun Lyte MX. Fusing the fluid lines of the GEL-Kenun series with seat-belt buckle design inspiration, this cushioned silhouette delivers a secure, supportive fit that works with your natural gait to guide efficient strides all day long. Borrowing from the iconic GEL-LYTE III, a split tongue and plush collar make for an easy-on, easy-off trait that doubles as a style-focused detail. Weight: 6.4. Heel Height: 22. Forefoot Height: 12.

reviews.title: a lite duty general purpose shoe
reviews.text:
I hd to send back my normal size, a 9EEE, for a size larger. I've had this variation in size before with New Balance so beware. I'm still giving it 5 stars for style and price.

You may have noticed that price varies considerably with the color sub/style you choose. Mine were only $21 while others are substantially more. I assume construction is the same on all of them? Maybe the price is based on the current inventory? My price dropped slightly after I ordered.

While it is sold as a running shoe (?) and is probably adequate for this purpose a serious high mileage runner would probably pay more to get more. If you can get the right price point as I did they are certainly worth a try as a general purpose/athletic/walking shoe.

title: New Balance Kids' 680 V6 Hook and Loop Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 680 v6 kids' running shoe is a sneaker that blends style and performance to satisfy both kids and adults alike. A modern design ups your little one's cool factor, featuring a no-sew construction for a sleek fit and feel that's snug and secure without being too tight, delivering both a comfortable fit and contemporary style. The streamlined silhouette on these running shoes for kids includes leather and mesh upper material with a stitched-down tip and foxing details for flexible support and lasting durability. These kids' performance shoes also include an ABZORB midsole that absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, for a cushioned ride that takes kiddos from the classroom to the playground and everywhere in between. These comfortable kids' running shoes are available in a variety of colors that range from neutral to bold and bright, so your child can pick the one that suits their style and boosts their confidence.
features: Rubber sole

Most kids by the time they get to this style shoe CAN tie their own shoes, but its so much easier and quicker for them just to  be able to do the velcro and go!We love them.

reviews.title: Love the idea, needs some redesign
reviews.text: I really want to like this shoe more. I do actually use them a lot but it took nearly half a year to really break them in, and they’re still fairly difficult to slip into, as the opening is not very flexible. The shoe itself is tight enough where the laces don’t even really need to be there, and the toe box is fairly narrow which isn’t very good for running and hiking. My pinky toe often feels wedged by this one part of the design and frequently causes pain. I really REALLY like the idea of this shoe though and it’s still wearable for moderate hikes under 2 hours, I just wish they put more work and testing. It’s probably better for people with thinner, narrower feet. My feet are medium wide and the top part is kind of high.

reviews.title: Fits just right

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Nimbus 18 Running Shoe
description:
After 18 years of innovation, the Nimbus® series continues as one of the most recognized high performing footwear by ASICS. The new gel® placement offers modernized geometry of cushioning, designed to improve adaptability and mitigate brisk impacts. Improved guidance line® technology harmoniously syncs componentry to embrace the motions of the runner gait cycle.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
FluidRide: FluidRide  provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement on multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidFit:  ASICS FluidFit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.
Heel Clutching System: Exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment.
Seamless construction

reviews.title: Great shoes!!
reviews.text:
Great shoe! My kiddo loves these. They are a good quality and fit perfect!
These are wayyyy better quality than anything Walmart has for a low price. I think they are a happy medium between Walmart and sketchers brand shoes. Considering how fast my kiddos go through sneakers I need quality and cheaper

reviews.title: hobibear boys shoe
reviews.text: 5 year old grandson chose these shoes online and loves them.  They are easy on and off... quite bright in color.  The sizing was spot on for us.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Great kid shoes
reviews.text: Super cute shoes. I bought these for two of my girls and they’ve been wearing them all spring and loving them. If you don’t know what size to buy you should purchase a shoe sizer for home. I bought one years ago and I’m able to size my kids feet easily and accurately.the sizes of these shoes were spot on.

reviews.title: Kids like these
reviews.text:
My grandsons love these kind of shoes.
Kids go through shoes sooooo fast. Also, the fact they don't have to tie their shoes is convenient

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Both two pairs for my boys and they love it. Their new favorite twinning shoes.

title: adidas Performance Men's Galactic Elite M Running Shoe
description: The men's Galactic Elite shoes feature a breathable, flexible mesh upper for a natural run. With ADIPRENE+ cushioning and an ADIWEAR outsole for ultimate high-wear durability.
features: 100% Textile/Synthetic
Imported
Synthetic sole
Air mesh upper for maximum breathability
Anatomically placed flex grooves for reduced weight, flexibility, and natural movement
ADIPRENE+ in forefoot for propulsion and efficiency
Integrated sockliner for support and comfort
ADIWEAR outsole for durability and traction

reviews.title: Great running shoes
reviews.text: Excellent running shoes. The fit is more on the tight side, but it definitely fits. I give it 4/5 stars because it's not quite as comfortable as the Adidas Duramo line which also has adiprene. However I have yet to run a lot in these so it may be better than Duramo in the long term, or for more intense running. Duramo's have extra padding that, while very comfortable, feels like it could eventually start to chafe. These have a more snug fit with no such padding, but are still very comfortable.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: good shoe for the cost -shipping was fast

reviews.title: Great gift
reviews.text: Great fit. Great gift. Looks just like the picture

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Good quality,

reviews.title: Four Stars
reviews.text: Very comfortable and perfect for work or gym.

title: New Balance Women's Fresh Foam Arishi Trail V1 Trail Running Shoe
description: Hit the trails in comfort and style with the Fresh Foam Arishi Trail running shoes from New Balance. These comfortable running shoes are built tough with performance features designed to help keep your feet safe and supported. Toe Protect technology helps shield your feet from rocks, roots and debris as you tackle new terrain, and a durable AT Tread dual lug outsole provides versatile traction for both on- and off-road adventures. These trail shoes are crafted with textile and synthetic uppers that feature classic New Balance branding for a fresh, sporty look. No-sew upper construction adds to the sleek fit and feel that you'd expect from these lightweight running shoes. Underfoot, you’re treated to super soft comfort with Fresh Foam midsole technology that is precision-engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride. An EVA foam insert adds even more cushioned comfort to help fuel your runs. Wherever your trail takes you, arrive in comfort with these sleek, stylish and supportive running shoes.
features: Imported
Rubber sole
Fresh Foam midsole cushioning is precision engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride
GORE-TEX waterproof fabric protects feet from wind, rain and water without sacrificing breathability
AT Tread outsole provides versatile traction during both on and off-road activities
Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris
Upper features no-sew construction for a sleek fit and feel

reviews.title: Best walking and running shoes.
reviews.text: I live the fit and comfort of these shoes.

reviews.title: Not wide, runs small.
reviews.text: I ordered 6.5 wide but it was too small and tight, so I had to exchanged it for size 7 wide.  It is still a bit tight so you need to know if you want wide this isn't the one. Runs small.

reviews.title: Good shoe
reviews.text: Nice

reviews.title: Odd fit
reviews.text: While fits well the ankle & back are too high & rub uncomfortably.

reviews.title: Excelente producto

features: 100% Synthetic
Rubber sole
AmpliFoam Midsole: Engineered to maintain durability at softer densities, providing better flexibility, comfort, and platform adaptability ideal for natural running.
Ortholite Sockliner: Moisture management (Ortholite is a registered trademark of O2 Partners LLC).

GEL Technology: Cushioning provides excellent shock absorption

reviews.title: I love these shoes
reviews.text: I have owned several of this brand and I love them. They are definitely comfortable and last a long time. Great price also.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: I am a runner with bad planters fasciitis and while I still use my own inserts, the shoe is very comfortable.

reviews.title: Best wide width shoes ive had
reviews.text: Great support, very comfortable after my foot surgery.

reviews.title: They felt comfortable, liked the color.
reviews.text:
I ordered these a 1/2 size larger, unfortunately they did not fit. Toes were right at edge.
I tried on one shoe and they felt very nice and soft yet stable at the same time.
I did return them due to the size.
I did not reorder because I have no way of know if I should go up a 1/2 size or a whole.
I’m sure they would be great shoes otherwise.

reviews.title: Enjoying walking again
reviews.text: I'm a size 10.5 on one foot and just barely over a 10 on the other foot. These fit well and work for both feet. I walk 1 to 2 miles a day and was having intense pain in my shins and feet. I did some research and ended up chosing this pair. While these shoes have not gotten rid of all the pain, they have alleviated most of it. It makes me confident that most of the pain from walking was in having the wrong footwear.

title: Klitch Footwear Clip Sports Accessory, Hang Extra Shoes Cleats Boots or Gear on Your Bag. Works on Soccer, Baseball, Basketball, Track, Running Shoes, Flip Flops and More.
description: The Klitch is a footwear clip that allows you to hang extra sneakers or cleats to the outside of your bag. This avoids getting the inside of your bag dirty, smelly, and full. Great for anyone who plays sports, works out, or has an active lifestyle. The Klitch can be used for any type of footwear up to 10 lbs!
features: PATENTED: The Klitch Footwear Clip allows you to carry extra shoes outside your bag allowing your shoes to air out and the contents of your bag to stay clean and fresh!
QUICK & EASY: No more messy and difficult knots to tie or untie. Quickly and easily clamp and clip extra shoes or equipment to your bag with no fuss!
PERFECT FOR SPORTS: Great for soccer cleats, football cleats, baseball spikes, basketball shoes, track shoes, hiking boots, flip-flops and much more!
ON THE GO: Great for traveling, hiking, camping or organizing at home. Hang extra shoes or equipment in your garage, lockers, tents or shoe racks!
CUSTOMER FIRST: The Klitch Footwear Clip includes a 1-year full replacement when purchased through Klitch!

reviews.title: Great for Volleyball Shoes
reviews.text:
Absolutly love it ... hold volleyball shoes on the outside of the bag ... if there was an update to the design it would be to make a clip open wide enough so shoes could go heel to heel to keep dirt or elements together.

If you looking for a clip to hold shoes on the outside of the bag -- Look No Further - THIS IS IT!

reviews.title: Does it’s job
reviews.text: This product does the job. No frills but does what it’s designed to do. The clip gets a little hard to open but o actually like it because running throw the airport with muddy sneakers o never worry about them coming loose

reviews.title: Not worth 20 or even 15
reviews.text: Good idea, but the metal clip fell of within 20 uses. This item just isn't made with quality in mind, wish it was!

reviews.title: Great while it lasted!
reviews.text: Worked great for about 5 months.

reviews.title: Cheap junk
reviews.text: The plastic broke after using it 5 or 6 times. Avoid.

title: New Balance Women's W1260V5 Running Shoe
description: We stand for something bigger than sneakers. We champion those who are fearlessly driven by their passions. We elevate sport. We do right by people and the planet. Together, we drive meaningful change in communities around the world. We Got Now.
features: 50% Breathable Air Mesh, 50% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
ABZORB heel crash pad absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance
Asymmetrical heel counter
Breathable air mesh
Dual-density construction utilizes softer EVA on top for comfort and cushioning, with more dense EVA on bottom for support

reviews.title: Runs a tad large, order 1/2 size down.. still 5+ stars!!!!
reviews.text: I have bought New Balance 1260’s for years and I am always a size 10.  This shoe was too big as a 10 and I had to return for a 9.5.  That being said, I still give it 5 stars and would give more if I could!  These were by far the most comfortable, light weight, and best looking (better than the pic by far) New Balance I’ve ever owned. I ordered in another color the next day!  Love these shoes.

reviews.title: Great shoes though
reviews.text: Even though I ordered wide width they are a little more snug across the ball of my foot than my other new Balance shoes of the same size.  Great shoes though.  Very comfortable and lightweight.  Love the color too!

reviews.title: These v5's are even more comfortable and have a sleeker narrower fit
reviews.text: Wow! I have 2 pair of the 1260v4 that are my absolute favs.  These v5's are even more comfortable and have a sleeker narrower fit. I love the color and the attention to details.

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoes!
reviews.text: I loved these shoes the first moment I put them on my feet.  They are so comfortable and provide so much support.  You really get your money's worth in these shoes.  They are like walking on clouds.  I walked in a 5K recently and they were amazing and my feet felt great afterwards. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Great style!
reviews.text: Great Shoe! I have received compliments on the style!

title: Avia Avi Factor Slip On Girls' Sneakers - Lightweight Tennis, Athletic, Running Shoes for Girls - Toddler, Little Kid, and Big Kid Sizes 11 to 6
features: Rubber sole
PERFORMANCE SNEAKERS FOR GIRLS - A sturdy, dependable everyday sneaker that provides ultimate durability for active kids. The lightweight, breathable mesh overlays create comfort and ventilation.

SLIP ON, NO TIE LACES ALTERNATIVE CLOSURE - Gore, bungee, or toggle lace closures with no tying makes an easy, fast on and off option for toddlers, preschoolers, and kids of all ages. The perfect camp, sports, everyday, or back to school shoes! Available in sizes toddler 10 to big kid 6.
COMFORTABLE & DURABLE GIRLS ATHLETIC SHOES - The Avia compression molded EVA midsole and removable EVA sock add supportive cushioning for all-day wear.
COOL TODDLER & GIRLS SNEAKERS - In trendy, versatile colors, these running shoes go with everything in their wardrobes - and they stand out in the crowd!
NON-MARKING TPR SOLEPLATE - Kids will leave their mark on people, not on the ground or gym floor! The thick but light weight rubber sole holds up to everyday wear and play.

reviews.title: Great little athletic shoes
reviews.text: My daughter, age 5, wears a size 13(kid) and has a wide foot. These shoes fit nicely. I like that there isn't any velcro. Velcro never holds up well and everything gets stuck to it. These shoes are closer to the shoes that we'll be buying in the near future once my daughter masters tying laces. Highly recommend these shoes.

reviews.title: Pretty and comfortable but looked worn very quickly
reviews.text: My granddaughter loved these shoes - she loved the colors and the fit -  but they wore out in a matter of a few weeks.

reviews.title: True Size Fit
reviews.text: These girl's tennis shoes are so cute! They're also pretty comfortable. The slip-on feature is easy and the shoes stay on. Traction is good. They are true size fit. And they're very affordable.

reviews.title: Pretty
reviews.text:
They liked the rainbow sneakers. These sneakers were good. She could run in them without a problem.
These shoes are very nice. They were cute for my child. They thought they were comfortable. The fit was fine. They were able to use it for different situations. They were easy to put on and off. The quality seemed fine. They looked good on her. She liked them. The deal was fine. I would recommend them.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: Fits as expected, pretty design and colors.  Comfortable,  well made, good brand.

title: Brooks Men’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported

THIS MEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely light and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

reviews.title: My new favorite running shoe.
reviews.text: Perfect fit right out of the box.  Wonderful cushioned run and very light weight.  Well made and no signs of wear even after several long runs.  Wide enough toe box to prevent any rubbing.  True to size.

reviews.title: BROOKS ARE The BEST SHOES HANDS DOWN
reviews.text: Nothing to dislike light durable great for weightlifting

reviews.title: Get what you pay for
reviews.text:
I sent these back after trying on. They look longer than they are when on your feet, I assume it’s due to the design. Didn’t have the best feel and overall a great name but bad shoe.
I’d go with a better brooks or On Clouds

reviews.title: Very light and comfortable
reviews.text: Nice and light and comfortable which was what I wanted. I love how well they fit. Good price, too, for the quality.
